claims.text: GDACS's forest fire event report for Portugal (event 1029260, covering 02-08 July 2026) assessed an Orange alert, stating 'forest fire can have a medium humanitarian impact based on the burned area and the affected population and their vulnerability,' with 19,670 hectares burned and 9,361 people exposed in the burned area.

description: Multiple wildfires broke out across inland northern and central Portugal in early July 2026 amid a severe heatwave, drought-dry vegetation and strong winds, with the most serious fronts concentrated around the Viseu district. GDACS assessed an Orange alert for medium humanitarian impact as the fires spread.

impact.summary: GDACS's continuously updated event report assessed an Orange alert (medium humanitarian impact) for wildfires burning across Portugal between 2 and 8 July 2026, citing about 19,670 hectares burned and roughly 9,361 people exposed within the fire-affected area.

location.region: Inland northern and central Portugal, centred near Viseu district

name: Wildfires — Portugal
